# command: sudo ss -tulpn
# date_utc: 2026-05-20T00:00:00Z

Netid State  Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port Peer Address:Port Process
tcp   LISTEN 0      128    0.0.0.0:22       0.0.0.0:*       users:(("sshd",pid=2001,fd=3))
udp   UNCONN 0      0      0.0.0.0:5353     0.0.0.0:*       users:(("avahi-daemon",pid=2002,fd=12))
tcp   LISTEN 0      128    127.0.0.1:5432   0.0.0.0:*       users:(("postgres",pid=2003,fd=5))
